en.text: from the same as H0098; a marshy pool (others from a different root, a kettle); by implication a bulrush (as growing there); collectively a rope of bulrushes

senses.gloss_en: from the same as H0098; a marshy pool (others from a different root, a kettle); by implication a bulrush (as growing there); collectively a rope of bulrushes
